authors_affiliation: Sebastián Cajas, Pedro Astaiza, David Santiago Garcia-Chicangana, Camilo Segura, Diego M Lopéz; University of Cauca, Popayán, Colombia

result.evaluation_split: 10-fold cross-validation on the training set; the paper states the full approach could not be submitted for the official challenge testing score due to lack of computational resources/time

self_reported_metrics.other: Challenge score of 0.22 obtained via 10-fold cross-validation on the training set using the final CNN model

model.architecture_details: 1D convolutional neural network (1D-CNN) with 4 output filters, kernel size 4, stride 1, taking the 27 PCA-selected features as a sequence input, with ReLU activation. RNN, LSTM, and CNN+LSTM hybrid architectures were also tried but the CNN performed best.
model.key_novelty: Uses classical signal-processing feature engineering (300 time/frequency/statistical/non-linear features per lead, PCA-reduced to 27) as the input representation for a lightweight 1D-CNN, rather than feeding raw ECG waveforms directly into the network.

input.signal_length_window: not reported (feature-based pipeline; per-record input reduced to a 27-feature vector rather than a fixed raw-waveform window)
input.preprocessing: Savitzky-Golay smoothing filter selected for denoising (compared against Symlet- and Daubechies-family wavelet decomposition/thresholding); custom detrending method to remove baseline drift; missing categorical fields (e.g. sex) imputed with the mean value; features normalized using the Keras normalization module

data.training_datasets: Official challenge training set only (reported as 6877/"more than 6800" ECG recordings overall; 4813 records shown feeding the feature-extraction pipeline in Figure 1); no external data reported

training.cross_validation_strategy: 10-fold cross-validation (K-fold, via scikit-learn) on the training set

contribution.summary: Extracts 300 time-, frequency-, statistical-, and non-linear-domain features per lead, selects 27 via PCA-based feature selection, and classifies 9 arrhythmia classes with a compact 1D-CNN, prioritizing model interpretability over end-to-end raw-signal deep learning.
